mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_paper (exam_type_id, exam_subject_id, title, time_limit_min, is_active) VALUES (#{examTypeId}, #{examSubjectId}, #{title}, #{timeLimitMin}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_paper SET exam_type_id = #{examTypeId}, exam_subject_id = #{examSubjectId}, title = #{title}, time_limit_min = #{timeLimitMin}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE id = #{id}
